enabled.title: enabled
enabled.description: Enabled states if iframe embedding is enabled or disabled.

allowedOrigins.title: allowed_origins
allowedOrigins.description: AllowedOrigins defines which origins are allowed to embed Zitadel in an iframe.

embeddedIframe.title: embedded_iframe
embeddedIframe.description:
EmbeddedIframeSettings defines if the login UI can be embedded in an iframe
 and which origins are allowed to do so.

enableImpersonation.title: enable_impersonation
enableImpersonation.description:
If enabled, users are allowed to impersonate other users.
 The impersonator needs the appropriate `*_IMPERSONATOR` roles assigned as well".
